requirement_topic.en: Bahrain Civil Defence Fire-Safety Review for BESS Installations
requirement_topic.zh: 巴林民防消防安全对BESS安装的审查
requirement_topic.zht: 巴林民防消防安全對BESS安裝的審查

summary.en: Bahrain Civil Defence (General Directorate of Civil Defence) administers fire-safety approval for buildings and installations in the Kingdom of Bahrain. BESS installations, particularly those with significant energy capacity, are subject to Civil Defence fire-safety review for building permit, installation approval, and occupancy. Fire-safety documentation for BESS installations typically includes fire-protection system design, thermal-runaway mitigation evidence, ventilation or gas-detection provisions, emergency shutdown systems, and emergency response procedures. Project owners, insurers, and lenders may additionally require international BESS fire-safety standard evidence such as IEC 62619:2022 or NFPA 855 compliance documentation even where Bahrain has not formally adopted those standards as mandatory.
summary.zh: 巴林民防总局负责管理巴林王国建筑和装置的消防安全审批。BESS安装，尤其是容量较大的装置，须经过民防消防安全审查方可取得建筑许可、安装批准和占用证。BESS安装的消防安全文件通常包括消防保护系统设计、热失控缓解证据、通风或气体探测措施、紧急停机系统和应急响应程序。项目业主、保险方和贷款方可能额外要求国际BESS消防安全标准证据，例如IEC 62619:2022或NFPA 855合规文件，即使巴林尚未正式将这些标准纳入强制要求。
summary.zht: 巴林民防總局負責管理巴林王國建築和裝置的消防安全審批。BESS安裝，尤其是容量較大的裝置，須經過民防消防安全審查方可取得建築許可、安裝批准和佔用證。BESS安裝的消防安全文件通常包括消防保護系統設計、熱失控緩解證據、通風或氣體探測措施、緊急停機系統和應急響應程序。項目業主、保險方和貸款方可能額外要求國際BESS消防安全標準證據，例如IEC 62619:2022或NFPA 855合規文件，即使巴林尚未正式將這些標準納入強制要求。

standards_or_laws: Bahrain Civil Defence fire-safety requirements for buildings and installations
IEC 62619:2022 (thermal abuse, overcharge, short-circuit, and safety requirements relevant to fire risk)
NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems, referenced internationally for BESS fire safety)

summary.en: China relies on GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 for BESS cell and battery safety, and project-specific fire-safety review under Chinese building and fire-code regulations. Chinese fire-code documentation does not replace Bahrain Civil Defence review or internationally recognised fire-safety standards evidence requested by project stakeholders.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023管理BESS电芯和电池安全，并对固定式储能安全实施项目级消防审查（依据中国建筑和消防法规）。中国消防规范文件不能替代巴林民防审查或项目方要求的国际认可消防安全标准证据。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023管理BESS電芯和電池安全，並對固定式儲能安全實施項目級消防審查（依據中國建築和消防法規）。中國消防規範文件不能替代巴林民防審查或項目方要求的國際認可消防安全標準證據。

standards_or_laws: China building fire-code project review requirements

gap.en: Prepare a BESS fire-safety package for Bahrain Civil Defence review, including fire-protection system design drawings, thermal-runaway mitigation evidence (preferably with IEC 62619:2022 accredited-lab reports), gas detection and ventilation design, emergency shutdown logic, monitoring system description, and Arabic-language emergency response procedures. Engage a local fire-safety consultant familiar with Civil Defence submission requirements early in the project design phase.
gap.zh: 为巴林民防审查准备BESS消防安全资料包，包括消防保护系统设计图纸、热失控缓解证据（优选附IEC 62619:2022认可实验室报告）、气体探测和通风设计、紧急停机逻辑、监控系统描述，以及阿拉伯语应急响应程序。在项目设计阶段早期聘用熟悉民防申报要求的当地消防安全顾问。
gap.zht: 為巴林民防審查準備BESS消防安全資料包，包括消防保護系統設計圖紙、熱失控緩解證據（優選附IEC 62619:2022認可實驗室報告）、氣體探測和通風設計、緊急停機邏輯、監控系統描述，以及阿拉伯語應急響應程序。在項目設計階段早期聘用熟悉民防申報要求的當地消防安全顧問。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for BESS installations requiring building permit and occupancy approval in Bahrain; Civil Defence fire-safety review is a condition of installation approval
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic BESS installations under Chinese building and fire-code regulations; requirements differ from Bahrain Civil Defence

source.publisher: General Directorate of Civil Defence, Kingdom of Bahrain

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain Civil Defence fire-safety review is mandatory for BESS installations. Prepare a fire-safety package with IEC 62619:2022 thermal-runaway evidence, fire-protection design, and Arabic emergency procedures. Chinese fire-code documents do not substitute for Civil Defence review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林民防消防安全审查是BESS安装的强制要求。准备含IEC 62619:2022热失控证据、消防设计和阿拉伯语应急程序的消防安全资料包。中国消防规范文件不能替代民防审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林民防消防安全審查是BESS安裝的強制要求。準備含IEC 62619:2022熱失控證據、消防設計和阿拉伯語應急程序的消防安全資料包。中國消防規範文件不能替代民防審查。
